content.en:
Ye Tian was not in a hurry to refine the resources from the Bone Clan, so he began to study the manual from the Bone Emperor.

This manual records some information from the Bone Emperor, such as the division of the Bone Emperor.

The cultivation of the Bone Emperor is roughly divided into three levels, the first level is the Bone Emperor who has just broken through, although this Bone Emperor is much stronger than the Bone King, but it will not be too exaggerated, if there are enough Bone Kings, there is even hope to consume a Bone Emperor.

The second level is the Bone Emperor who has mastered the strongest ancestral technique, and the bone clan also cultivates the ancestral technique, and the name is similar.

But the ultimate ancestral technique is almost the most powerful ancestral technique in the world, representing the ultimate, that is, the limit.

However, there is still a Supreme Ancestral Technique on top of the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and it does not say anything about the secrets of the Supreme Ancestral Technique and how to cultivate it, after all, the Bone Emperor will not teach Ye Tian to cultivate the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

In short, if the Bone Emperor has mastered the Supreme Ancestral Technique, and his cultivation has been promoted to a certain level, he can be ranked at the second level.

There is also a third level, that is, the peak realm that belongs to the Bone Emperor, mastering many supreme ancestral skills, cultivating to the extreme, unable to improve one more step, and only one step away from the next realm.

Above the Bone Emperor, it is called the Bone Saint, which can be called the invincible ancestor division of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"I should still belong to the first level of the Supreme Ancestor now, and I must master a Supreme Ancestor technique before I can step into the second level. However, my foundation is too deep, and my cultivation is the Endless Ancestor Dao, so my true combat power should not be far from the second level!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

How to master a supreme ancestral technique, he had some guesses in his heart, but he was not sure.

"Wait a day, let the Replica Body Heyuan Holy Beast consult the two Supreme Sacred Beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, they may know!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to refine the resources from the bone clan, and his strength continued to improve.

In the blink of an eye, several realm epochs had passed in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

At this time, Ye Tian had already finished refining the resources from the Bone Clan, and he wanted to trade with the Bone Clan again, but unfortunately the Bone Clan began to be perfunctory, so he couldn't trade too many resources from the Bone Clan, but on the side of the Haitian Holy Sect, the copy body sent over some resources from time to time, so that he had no shortage of cultivation resources.

In addition, he often sent some resources from the Dark Forbidden Domain to the Replica Body Heyuan Holy Beast to cultivate, so the strength of this Replica Body also improved relatively quickly, and it was not far from the extreme of the top Saint Beast.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body, the Heyuan Holy Beast, came to visit one of the strongest Holy Beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, the Wolf Bone Holy Beast.

"Meet the Lord of the Wolf Bone Holy Beast!"

Ye Tian's copy body Heyuan Holy Beast said respectfully.

"He Yuan, what are you looking for me?"

The Wolf Bone Sacred Beast asked.

"I'd like to ask Lord Wolf Bone Sacred Beast some questions. Ye Tian said.

"Tell me, what do you ask?"

The wolf bone holy beast said lightly.

"Lord Wolf Bone Holy Beast, I want to know how to comprehend the Supreme Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian asked.

Holy art is the name of the ancestral technique of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, and the holy art here is equivalent to the ancestral technique of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

And the Supreme Sacred Technique is equivalent to the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

When the wolf bone holy beast heard the name of the Supreme Holy Technique, it immediately said coldly: "He Yuan, this is not the knowledge you should know, you are just a top holy beast, and you will know it when you step into the Supreme Holy Beast." "

"Lord Wolf Bone Holy Beast, I'm just curious. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

Then, under his constant requests, the wolf bone holy beast said: "It doesn't hurt to tell you, if you want to comprehend the Supreme Holy Art, you must go to the foreign world to comprehend a similar ultimate holy art, and then fuse the ultimate holy art of our holy world with the same kind of extreme holy art in the foreign world, just like the method of impacting the Supreme Holy Beast." But if you can't step into the Supreme Holy Beast level, you won't be able to fuse the two Ultimate Holy Arts. "

"Wolf Bone Holy Beast, once you fuse the Ultimate Sacred Technique of the two heavens and earths, you can break the shackles of the Ultimate Sacred Technique and comprehend a supreme holy technique?" Ye Tian said excitedly.

"That's good!" the Wolf Bone Holy Beast nodded, "However, so far, only one Supreme Holy Beast in our Sacred Realm has comprehended the Supreme Holy Art, so don't think about it!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded and retreated.

......

"According to the news I learned from the mouth of the wolf bone holy beast, there should only be one supreme holy beast in the second level in the holy realm heaven and earth, no, it is possible that the supreme holy beast who has comprehended the supreme holy art has also reached the third level. However, the strength of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth is still not strong, and when I become strong in the future, there is still a great hope of completely encroaching on this Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth. Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copy body began to retreat and comprehend the creation of the ultimate ancestral technique.

The Ultimate Ancestral Technique he was about to create was the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and once he created the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of the Sacred Realm, he could fuse it with the Absolute Absolute Ancestral Technique of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he would hopefully merge into the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

At that time, his strength would be increased by a terrifying amount, and he would instantly step into the second level of the Supreme Ancestor.

However, this replica body does not have the power of the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment, and it will be very difficult to create the Ultimate Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

He could spend a lot of time creating comprehensions, but maybe it would be more than a dark calendar, and at that time, he would not be able to step into the second level of the Supreme Ancestor during the Holy Land Heaven and Earth Tribulation.

"First bestow the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment of Power to the Replicating Body, wait for the Replicating Body to create the Ultimate Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and then take back the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment of Strength. "

Ye Tian planned.

But there is a risk in this plan, that is, the talent given cannot be replicated, that is to say, Ye Tian will temporarily lose the power of the Ultimate Ancestral Fu, once the copy body of the Heyuan Holy Beast falls, he will lose the power of the Ultimate Ancestral Fu.

In that case, he would have to find a large number of power ancestral endowments to re-replicate, and then slowly fuse them into the Ultimate Strength Ancestral Endowment, which would undoubtedly waste a lot of his time, and he might not even be able to obtain the Ultimate Strength Ancestral Endowment again.

It's worth the risk compared to the harvest, though.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body entered the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land again, and then the body invaded the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, and instantly gave the Ultimate Ancestor of Power to the copy body, and the body left the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land.

Having obtained the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment of Strength, the Replicating Body Heyuan Holy Beast suddenly improved many times in terms of the comprehension of creating the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Strength.

Next, Ye Tian's copied body comprehended the rules of heaven and earth power in the forbidden land of sea and sky, creating the ultimate ancestral technique of hegemony.

With the power of the ultimate ancestor as an aid, the speed of replicating the body's comprehension is very fast.

It is estimated that it will not be long before he can create the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Hegemony.

Sure enough.

In just ten realm years, the copying body has successfully created the Ultimate Ancestor Technique.

If he didn't have the power of the Ultimate Ancestral Skill, he was afraid that it would take countless times as long to create the Ultimate Extreme Ancestor Technique.

He did not enter the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land again, otherwise the time interval would be too short and would arouse suspicion.

It had been a few realm eras before Ye Tian's copy body applied to enter the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land.

The copied body returned to the forbidden land of the sea and the sky, and the memories were shared, and Ye Tian's body naturally obtained the memory of the copied body, and also obtained the hegemonic ultimate ancestral technique from the holy heaven and earth.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian invaded the Haitian Forbidden Land again, stripped the power of the copied body, and captured this talent.

At this point, Ye Tian's plan was completed.

Once the two Sect Hegemony Ultimate Ancestor is in his hands, once fused, he can step into the second level of the Supreme Ancestor.
